name: arsyaddownload
description: Download API Server - YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok

scripts.build:check: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('./artifacts/api-server/dist')) { console.log('Building...'); require('child_process').execSync('npm run build:api', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.dev: export NODE_ENV=development && npm run build:api && npm start
scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; echo "Using npm package manager"'

author: ArsyadCyber
